WARNING: These signals are for A2779 STANDARD (820-02841, X2523/MLB_S) ONLY.

power_enables.name: PPVAON_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V8 AON VR enable — gates the main PP3V8_AON rail via U5700

power_enables.name: P5V2TPS_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 5V S2 VR enable — gates PP5V_S2 from UC259

power_enables.name: LCD_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: LCD power enable — gates display power sequencer UP710

power_enables.name: CHGR_AUX_OK
power_enables.description: Charger AUX OK — indicates charger is ready. Pull up to PP1V8_AON or 3V3 via MOSTUFF (page 30)

power_good_fault.name: PMU_ACTIVE_READY
power_good_fault.description: PMU active ready — indicates PMU has completed startup

power_good_fault.name: PPVAON_ILIMIT_L
power_good_fault.description: 3V8 AON current limit flag from summing amp

resets.name: SOC_FORCE_DFU
resets.description: Force DFU mode — puts SoC into Device Firmware Update mode

resets.name: SYS_DETECT
resets.description: System detect from BMU — battery flex J5150 gasket circuit via U5150 (BLKAMPMHY, CRITICAL). Must be present for PPBUS_AON.

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 0 — battery charger, power management

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C1
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 1 — SMC UPC I2C

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC0
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF400 (CD3217 ATC0) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC1
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF500 (CD3217 ATC1) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC2
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF600 (CD3217 ATC2) firmware ROM

sensor_adc.name: P3V8_AON_ISENSE (IMVR)
sensor_adc.description: P3V8 AON high side ISENSE. Gain: 10V, ESP: 11.614A. Rsense: 0.001 Ohm. Vsensei: 11.11 mV. Range: 15A. MPMU AMCA_A1 8ms

sensor_adc.name: 5V_S2_VR_ISENSE (ISSR)
sensor_adc.description: 5V S2 VR high side ISENSE. Gain: 200, ESP: 1.001A. Rsense: 0.005 Ohm. Vsensei: 5.005 mV. Range: 1.5A. MPMU AMCL_A1 8ms

sensor_adc.name: DCIN_VOLTAGE_SENSE (VDOR)
sensor_adc.description: DC input voltage sensor. Max adapter voltage: 28V to 5% = 13.7V. Divider gain: 0.21. Thevenin equivalent: 4.476K

sensor_adc.name: DCIN_ISENSE_AMON (IDOR)
sensor_adc.description: DC input current sensor. Max adapter current: 5A. AMON gain, RSENSE: 25mR, 10mV. SMK AMON OUTPUT VOLTAGE: 50mV

sensor_adc.name: BATTERY_ISENSE_BMON (IPBR)
sensor_adc.description: Battery monitor current sensor. BMON gain, RSENSE: 7.8K 5K. Max ADC input voltage: 1.5V, ESP: 4.0A. Max BATT CURRENT ISENSE: 37.97A

sensor_adc.name: PBUS_VOLTAGE_SENSE (VPOR)
sensor_adc.description: PPBUS voltage sensor. Max PPBUS voltage: 13.05V + 5% = 13.7V. Divider gain: 0.11. Thevenin equivalent: 4.555K

sensor_adc.name: P1V8VDDH_HIGH_SIDE_ISENSE (ISVR)
sensor_adc.description: 1V8 VDDH high side ISENSE. Rsense: 10.885k 33V R. Vsensei: 18.888V mV. Range: 20A. SPMU AMCA_A0 8ms

thermal_sensors.name: MPMU TDEV1-8
thermal_sensors.description: Master PMU 8 thermal sensors. TDEV1(Txxx), TDEV2(xxx), ..., TDEV8(xxx). Each with CRITICAL NTC and connection to GND_MPMU_QUIET1.

thermal_sensors.name: SPMU TDEV1-8
thermal_sensors.description: Slave PMU 8 thermal sensors. TDEV1-8 with CRITICAL NTC connections.

clvr_signals.name: CLVR_ADDR_STRAP_0/1/2
clvr_signals.description: CLVR address straps. DIFFERENT between S vs C/D variants. S uses specific I2CTARGET and SWPSS values per CLVR instance.

clvr_signals.name: CLVR_THROTTLE_PROBE
clvr_signals.description: CLVR throttle probe access. DIFFERENT between S, C, D variants. S variant has specific probe points: CLVR_BROU_BURST_L, CLVR_BROU_SLTTH_L on PPGASB_BRAVL
